settings.cache_duration_help: Specify how long the stats for the widget should be cached for (in seconds). 0 to disable caching (not recommended).
settings.flush_cache_on_new_registration_label: Flush Stats Cache on New Registration
settings.flush_cache_on_new_registration_help: If enabled, the stats cache will be flushed when a new user registers on the forum.
settings.classic_look_help: Restore the original widget appearance used before the fof/forum-widgets-core integration.

permissions.view_discussions_count_label: View forum statistics widget discussions count
permissions.view_posts_count_label: View forum statistics widget posts count
permissions.view_users_count_label: View forum statistics widget users count
permissions.view_lastest_member_label: View forum statistics widget latest member
